overall.description: A cinematic walk through a medieval stone archway into a castle courtyard, rendered in a game engine. The scene features historic stone architecture, formal gardens with a central fountain, and NPCs in period clothing walking through the grounds. Soft morning light creates a warm, atmospheric fantasy setting.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a stone archway entrance covered in ivy, with flowering bushes lining the cobblestone path. The camera walks forward through the narrow enclosed passage, transitioning through the archway into the open area beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle courtyard with formal gardens and central fountain

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges into a wide-open castle courtyard bathed in warm morning light. The historic stone castle dominates the background with red banners flying, while a formal garden with a central fountain stretches out before it. NPCs in medieval robes walk along the paths or sit on benches, and the camera continues walking through the cobblestone plaza toward the castle.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded, ivy-covered entrance into the expansive grandeur of a sunlit castle courtyard. It begins by gliding through a narrow stone archway lined with flowering bushes and cobblestones, moving forward through the enclosed passage. As the camera passes through the threshold, the space suddenly opens into a wide plaza bathed in warm morning light. The scene then expands to reveal a formal garden with a central fountain and NPCs in medieval robes, while red banners flutter from the historic stone castle that dominates the background. The camera continues its steady advance across the cobblestone plaza, drawing closer to the towering castle walls.
